'''Danadine''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="GG11" /> located in the [[Danadine system/Legends|Danadine system]], a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Dail sector/Legends|Dail sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Around [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations]]'' is set around six [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the events of {{Film|VI}}, which take place in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> it served as the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Relekin Confidential]], a collection agency that constituted a part of the [[Tenloss Syndicate/Legends|Tenloss Syndicate]].<ref name="GG11" />

==Behind the scenes==
Danadine was mentioned in the [[1994]] sourcebook ''[[Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations]]'', written by [[Rick D. Stuart]] for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="GG11" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Danadine [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Danadine itself, in grid square Q-18.<ref name="TEA" />
